personalInfo.name: Vivek Kalola
personalInfo.title: Senior AI Engineer
personalInfo.tags: Immediate joiner - DISTRIBUTED SYSTEMS - System design - AIOps - LLMOPS - AGENTIC WORKFLOWS - RAG
personalInfo.summary: Innovative Senior AI Engineer with 9 years of experience bridging high-performance distributed systems (Go, Java 21) with production-grade AI orchestration (LangGraph, RAG, Agentic Workflows). Proven track record of architecting local LLM pipelines, semantic search infrastructures, and enterprise AIOps platforms handling millions of events. Expert in optimising infrastructure footprints for open-source models, delivering user-first system design, and executing multi-cloud architectures under strict latency constraints.

highlights: Spearheaded the Google Meet integration, leveraging Windsurf to accelerate the development lifecycle, resulting in a 9% increase in upload volume.
Architected an asynchronous video insight and semantic search pipeline using Python, LangGraph, and ChromaDB to ingest and index transcribed Google Meet recordings.

Optimised infrastructure footprint by deploying local HuggingFace models for token embeddings, completely mitigating external API billing and rate-limiting constraints during high-volume data ingestion.
Re-architected fundamental SSO logic to decouple authentication dependencies, eliminating critical token-sharing vulnerabilities and migrating to a secure, user-level architecture.
Automated deployment workflows by implementing CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions and ArgoCD, reducing deployment time by 70% and minimizing human error.
Architected a multi-cloud networking solution to bridge private connectivity between AWS and Azure for a Tier-1 Telecom client, prioritizing high availability and regional scalability.
Conceptualized and executed the NMS & FinOps solution, scaling the system from a single-box concept to a cloud-native clustered solution that increased capacity by 300%.
Defined the product roadmap and requirements while leading a cross-functional team of Engineers and QA to deliver a Service-Oriented Architecture.
Engineered and open-sourced Vert.x SDKs, standardizing development processes and improving overall system performance.
Built a horizontally scalable Unified Observability platform using Java 17, Vert.x, and ClickHouse, facilitating near-real-time processing over 1 million daily events.

Developed a high-performance log parser using regex and template-based extraction; implemented a custom Vert.x load balancer to prevent worker saturation, making parsing 30% faster than traditional methods.
Engineered a custom Reporting Engine from scratch using a headless browser worker pool to render HD Vue.js widgets into PDFs, reducing browser spawn time and improving generation speed by 80%.

Integrated full-stack APM and RUM solutions by leveraging Datadog RUM SDK for beacon redirection and Skywalking as a Java agent for deep
application tracing.
Optimised network monitoring by deploying a passive APM solution capable of processing 1 Gbps traffic with near-zero packet drops.
Designed a surveillance reporting tool that processed 4 million client records in 8 minutes, significantly enhancing market monitoring speed.
Implemented technical solutions that reduced departmental processing time by 50% and eliminated 75% of manual paperwork.
Promoted from Associate to Senior Software Engineer after successfully engineering scalable warehousing solutions for receipt management.

education.degree: B.Tech in Information and Communication Technology (ICT)
